race.comment: NEIL (2) Highway winner last prep ready to show up today at his fourth run in. Worked hard early from the outside draw when he returned from a let-up with a tiring fifth over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Spot on for this from the good gate with Rawiller aboard. EXIT FEE (3) underrated gelding capable of finishing over the top of these first-up. Primed with the two trials at Goulburn and looks to get the right conditions. VEECEE (4) handy gelding who gets a much better set-up for this. Races best with his runs spaced and regular rider sticks. Don't dismiss at the good each way price. DANXIA (6) over raced early when up in trip with a tiring thirteenth over 1400m at Randwick in this class. Kept fresh and expected to take a sit here. No surprise to see him savage the line. SUNRISE RIDGE (11) talented filly going quickly through the grades. Respect.
